name: subagent: review-types invocation produces findings in §2.3 format {severity, rule_id?, file, line, finding, suggested_fix}
command: mkdir -p src && printf "const x: any = 1;\n" > src/a.ts && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/_runner.sh" --agent review-types --input "$PWD/src/a.ts" --emit-findings "$PWD/findings.jsonl" && grep -E "severity.*file.*line.*finding.*suggested_fix" findings.jsonl 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
